description_ai: Rates, cap rates, NOI, DSCR, LTV, delinquency, arbitrage, ownership structure
description_long: Capital market signals governing cost of money, asset pricing, leverage, credit quality, and structural ownership. Drives acquisition underwriting, exit timing, and capital stack decisions.

description: Housing market mechanics and supply/demand balance
description_ai: Rent, home price, AVM, absorption, vacancy, permits, supply pipeline, transactions
description_long: The mechanics of the housing market including price formation, tightness, supply constraints, and transaction velocity. Core to rental pricing, value estimation, and market cycle positioning.

description_ai: Population, migration, income, wages, household formation, demographics, affordability
description_long: Demand-side fundamentals: who lives where, what they earn, how households form, and where the affordability ceiling sits. Structural driver of long-term rental demand.

description: Location quality, economy, and risk context
description_ai: Employment, labor, schools, crime, climate hazard, commute, automation risk
description_long: The economic and environmental context of a location. Determines tenant demand quality, retention, and long-run neighborhood trajectory.

description_ai: Yield, cashflow, valuation marks, turns, capex, credit loss, occupancy operations
description_long: Internal performance layer covering financial outcomes and operational execution for owned assets. Feeds hold/sell/fix decisions and IC reporting.
